statements.select:
select b.* from member a join memdetail b on a.id = b.mid where a.role=2
and a.id = #id#
and a.username like '%' + #username# + '%'
and a.email = #email#
and a.pid = #pid#
and b.active = #active#
order by b.realname

select distinct b.* from member a join memdetail b on a.id=b.mid left join memteachreg c on b.mid=c.mid left join memsrcs d on b.mid=d.mid left join memindusclass e on b.mid=e.mid /* left join f on b.mid=f.mid */ where a.role=2
and ( b.realname like '%' + #KeyWord# + '%' or b.nickname like '%' + #KeyWord# + '%' or b.major like '%' + #KeyWord# + '%')
and d.tcclass = #TeachUnit#
and c.cityid = #RegOp#
and e.indscid=#IndsOp#
and b.zipcode in (select b.zipcode from city a join region b on a.id=b.cityid where a.id =#LiveReg#)
and b.active = #active#
order by b.realname
select cityid, title from memteachreg a join city b on a.cityid=b.id where mid = #mid#
select distinct mid, indscid, name, [order] from memindusclass a join indsclass b on a.indscid=b.id where mid = #mid# order by mid, [order]

select b.mid, b.realname, isnull(sum(c.hours), 0) sum_total, /* 所有時數加總 */ isnull(sum(case when c.tcclass='11' or c.tcclass='12' or c.tcclass='13' then c.hours else 0 end), 0) sum_bc, /* BC */ isnull(sum(case when c.tcclass='21' or c.tcclass='22' or c.tcclass='23' then c.hours else 0 end), 0) sum_dc, /* DC */ isnull(sum(case when c.tcclass='31' or c.tcclass='32' or c.tcclass='33' then c.hours else 0 end), 0) sum_kc /* KC */ from memdetail b join memsrcs c on b.mid = c.mid where 1=1 and b.mid = #mid# and c.ckeckd='2' /* 審核通過 */ and year(c.sdate) = year(getdate()) - 1 /* 前一年 */ group by b.mid, realname
select * from memsrcs where showoff=1 and ckeckd=2 and mid = #mid# order by sdate desc
select * from teasurvey as ts where ts.confirm=2 AND ts.fdate >= #today# order by ts.aodate
